app.exit_hint: Type 'exit' at any time to quit.
app.helpinfo: If you don't know a command you always can type 'help' to get a list of all Commands.
msg.material_item_use: You can't use a material item directly.
msg.equipment_item_use: is a piece of equipment and cannot be used directly.
msg.command.notinuse: The 'heal' command is no longer available. Use a potion or visit a healer.
ui_equipment_max: 🔒 This item is already at the maximum upgrade level (+9).
race.Myralu.desc: Adaptable scholars and combatants who balance body and mind. A well-rounded people suited to any path.
race.Rotuka.desc: Powerful and enduring warriors of the harsh northern wastes. High strength and endurance, but low affinity for magic.
race.Iymva.desc: Swift and dexterous hunters of the deep forests. Unmatched agility, though fragile under prolonged assault.
race.Zalu.desc: Stoic wanderers from the great plains. No innate advantages or weaknesses — their strength lies in steady, reliable growth.
race.Gavon.desc: Mystics with an ancient bond to spirit and intellect. Frail of body but commanding in magic and spirit.
race.Gamato.desc: Versatile craftspeople and traders. Modest bonuses across all stats make them dependable in any role.
race.Amato.desc: Humans — curious, adaptable, and uniquely attuned to runic magic. Their access to the Runic Mage class is unmatched by other races.
